node.text: Love this
Love this because I have a pair of beloved jeans my dogs ate but I can’t bring myself to discard
@myleskwren yea don’t discard the dog I’m sure it didn’t mean to

My grandpa passed a couple years ago, while cleaning his room i found a pair of jeans he used to wear, with a heart shaped patch stitched on a knee to cover a hole. I cried when i tried them on a couple of months ago and they didn’t fit. Losing weight just to be able to wear them again rn
@gabriele_salaa_ post a picture n let us know when it fits 😍!!! 🫶🏽
@gabriele_salaa_ avisanos cuando te queden ❤️
@gabriele_salaa_ let me know when they fit!! would love to see them
Love 🥰 this
